title: Outreach to ≥3 candidate stewards (logged)
context: Real-world impact is gated on a steward who actually uses an output; this task begins and logs outreach to ≥3 candidate labs/foundations (PLAN §2/§8 M3). A confirmed use flips that outcome's verifiedNeed to true.
objective: Contact ≥3 candidate stewards (labs/foundations) and log responses in governance/partners.md, noting that any confirmed use flips the relevant outcome's verifiedNeed to true.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 candidate labs/foundations are contacted; responses are logged in governance/partners.md.
Any confirmed use flips that outcome's verifiedNeed to true (recorded).
Outreach messaging is accurate and non-overclaiming (research, not medical advice).
No private contact data committed beyond what is consented/public.
output: governance/partners.md (logged outreach to ≥3 candidate stewards + responses).
